purpose: Define a safe synthetic input pack so local preview validators can run with mock or sanitized fixtures only, without real HR, payment, CRM, document, message or provider sources.
rules: Synthetic input pack is not an importer and cannot write data.
Every fixture must be synthetic or sanitized and source-safe.
Fixture paths must be local relative paths under allowed preview fixture folders.
Do not include real HR rows, real shopper contact data, bank data, document contents, message bodies or private links.
Runner may print commands and safe summaries, but must not call providers or production services.
Missing fixtures block execution for that validator only; they do not block continued backend documentation work.
Expected outcomes must be preview outcomes, not production success states.
claudePrototypeImpact: Prototype should not expose synthetic fixtures as real data.
Readiness UI may show missing input vs validator ready, but must not say real import executed.
Academia must explain synthetic fixtures, preview validation and why synthetic input differs from real migration.
hardStops: Do not include real data in synthetic pack.
Do not run production import, deploy, merge or provider calls from this runner.
Do not treat synthetic validation as proof that real data is clean.
Do not commit raw source exports to repo.
